archetype: Custom Scientific Workstation (Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Archetype 5: Luxury Deep Navy)

motion.philosophy: Functional & Minimal. Zero unnecessary shimmers or decorative animations.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-mono text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-slate-200 font-mono text-sm border border-slate-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200 font-mono text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-sm

cards.base: bg-[#0A0F1D] border border-slate-800 rounded-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col
cards.header: px-4 py-3 border-b border-slate-800 bg-[#060913]/50 flex items-center justify-between

data_display.sequence_viewer: font-mono bg-[#060913] p-4 rounded-sm border border-slate-800 overflow-x-auto whitespace-pre
data_display.canvas_container: w-full h-[500px] bg-black border border-slate-800 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden
data_display.purpose_strip: w-full bg-[#111827] border-b border-slate-800 px-6 py-3 flex items-center space-x-4 text-sm font-mono

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns, canvas nodes). Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='extract-promoter-button'
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for text against deep navy backgrounds. Nucleotide colors MUST have accessible variants or dark backgrounds to maintain readability.
accessibility_and_testing.aria: Include aria-labels for all icon-only buttons.

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract DNA particle strand, dark background. Use for hero section or overarching platform background.
Dark network graph lines. Use for Graph Studio background or mining visualization.

content_images.description: Modern biology lab with microscopes. Use in 'About' or 'Laboratory Context' sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Deep Navy/Dark Scientific theme. No bright purple gradients, no gaming glow.
Use standard <div> and <section> tags with pure Tailwind for layout to achieve a dense 'Control Room' aesthetic.
Implement Shadcn/UI for tables, selects, and dialogs, but override their border-radius to 2px or 0px to look sharper and more scientific.
Data density is critical. Use standard padding but don't waste vertical space with huge margins between metrics.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute for rigorous automated testing.
Nucleotide coloring in sequence viewers is mandatory (A: Green, T: Red, G: Yellow, C: Blue) using the text classes provided in the bio color config.
For graph network visualizations, aim for distinct node/edge colors with scientific legends (e.g., using Recharts, visx, or D3 patterns).
Ensure every screen incorporates the required structured sections: Purpose, Input, Analysis, Visualization, Output, Interpretation, Export.
